Really pleased, she explained everything before starting.
Fine overall, just not memorable.
The left half of my hair looks okay but the right half is noticeably shorter, you can spot it straight away.
Very kind lady, but her skill level for colour jobs is simply not there yet.
You can clearly make out lines in my hair where the foils crossed over each other.
She was polite enough, but honestly she doesn't have the hand for colour application.
The colour sat blotchy at the roots and faded out in random spots towards the ends.
Roots got way more product than the lengths, so some sections look dark and others barely took the dye.
There are visible bands in my hair where the foil sections overlapped, looks odd in sunlight.
Her brushwork was all over the place, whole chunks of hair got skipped completely.
Hands down the nicest facial I've gotten at home till date.
Very happy with her, she walked me through each step before she began.
Waxing was done beautifully, just the way I wanted.
Arrived on the dot, kept everything tidy, and the waxing result was superb.
I showed her a reference and still ended up with a completely different colour than what I asked for.
It went so badly that I had to visit a salon afterwards to get it corrected.
Nice girl, but colour work needs a trained hand and she doesn't have it.
Dye took properly in some areas and hardly at all in others, roots and tips look totally different.
The colour is blotchy, darker near the scalp and washed out at the bottom.
She spoiled it so much that I booked a parlour appointment the very next day to redo everything.
Requested ash brown and walked away with a loud orange instead, nowhere near what I picked.
Super courteous and skilled at her work, I would happily recommend her to anyone.
So happy, she briefed me on the whole process before getting started.
Easily the finest home waxing service I've booked yet.
Polite, well-mannered and great at her job, recommending her to everyone I know.
The layers don't match each other at all and my fringe sits at a slant.
The colour turned out totally blotchy, deep in some places and pale in others.
Wanted ash brown, ended up with a brassy orange that looks nothing like what I chose.
I clearly said ash brown and she gave me this odd orange tone instead.
She made such a mess of it that a salon visit was needed just to salvage my hair.
Colour absorbed randomly, a few sections came out dark while the rest stayed light.
My hair is visibly longer on the right than the left, the difference is obvious to everyone.
Good experience, she described what she would be doing at every stage before beginning.
Gorgeous manicure, precisely what I had in mind.
I book only her these days, the quality never dips.
She's warm and friendly, but honestly the colouring skill just isn't up to the mark.
Roots came out one tone and the ends another, with random light bits in between.
Colour application was inconsistent, thick near the crown and barely there at the tips.
You can spot clear lines running through my hair where the foil sections met.
There are obvious bands of colour where the foils were placed one over the other.
The way she handled the brush was sloppy, entire strips of hair never got any colour.
Distinct stripes are visible where the foil edges overlapped, very embarrassing to step out.
Even after showing her exactly what colour I wanted, the result came out completely different.
Wonderful session, she worked patiently and the outcome looks lovely.
On time, tidy setup, and the facial felt amazing.
Reached right on schedule, got everything ready fast, and the work was excellent.
The nicest facial I've experienced at home, truly relaxing.
She raced through every step, zero attention given to the final touches.
Kept picking up calls mid-service and then packed up before the time was over, saying she was running behind.
She headed out before the bleach even got its full time to set.
Everything done at top speed, she was zipping up her kit while my hair was still processing.
Attended two or three calls during my slot and wound up the session well before it should have ended.
Answered her mobile again and again, then cut my appointment short saying she was running behind schedule.
Half my appointment went with her chatting on calls about where she had to reach after me.
The whole thing was done at breakneck pace, finishing touches got no care whatsoever.
Warm, courteous and does her job really well, strongly recommend.
Very satisfied, she told me clearly what to expect before starting off.
By far the best waxing experience I have had at home.
She's become my go-to person, the results are reliable every single time.
The whole pedicure was over in 19 minutes when it normally takes a full hour, she just raced through it.
She sped through every step, zero patience with the finishing touches.
Kept chatting away on calls about where she had to reach next, my makeup was hardly her focus.
Half the session she was busy taking calls about her next client instead of doing my pedicure.
The massage portion got maybe two minutes and whole steps were simply skipped over.
Kept her mobile pressed to her ear discussing the client after me, my makeup clearly was not the priority.
She packed up and walked out before my nail colour had even dried.
Kept breaking off to answer calls, then dashed off midway saying she was running behind schedule.
Everything at top speed, she was zipping her bag closed while the wax was still sitting on my skin.
I book her every single time now, the quality never varies.
Hands down the nicest pedicure I have gotten at home till date.
Very happy, she walked me through each step before she began.
No salon visit has given me a pedicure this good, and this was at my own home.
So courteous and friendly through the whole visit, will happily suggest her to my friends.
The foot massage lasted barely a minute and she jumped straight past several steps.
It felt like a race against the clock, the last steps got no attention at all.
She made me rinse off way before time and you can tell from the finish.
Kept pushing me to wash my hands off before the proper time, and the nails show it.
A full manicure wrapped up in 22 minutes flat, she was obviously racing to leave.
Was told to wash everything off much sooner than needed, and the outcome speaks for itself.
Thirty minutes start to finish for a complete manicure, she was clearly sprinting through it.
So satisfied, she described the full process before touching my feet.
My nails look like they were done at a high-end parlour. Money well spent.
